meta.title: Richard Weitz on the U.S.-Russian takedown of an Afghan drug lord
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis Richard Weitz discussed the recent joint takedown of a Afghan drug lord by U.S. and Russian forces.
